title: Live Now - Pay Later
actors: Ian Hendry, June Ritchie, John Gregson
plot: Albert is a cheerful, unscrupulous "tally-man", a door-to-door salesman who cons housewives into buying things they don't need on the installment plan. He's happy - until he begins to fall in love.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
